shots.script_line: I sent one follow-up email this morning. Very normal. Very ethical.
shots.trigger_notes: thinking at 0.0s. blink between the two sentences. concerned from 'Very ethical.'

shots.script_line: Then the CRM lit up. Email opened. Link clicked. Reply received.
shots.camera_notes: Front-facing with possible push-in. CRM insert optional — see crm_monitor_closeup asset.
shots.trigger_notes: concerned at 0.0s → paranoid on 'CRM lit up'. Pupils drift toward monitor on each sub-beat.
shots.notes: Beat 03 V1 fallback uses jack_01 still. CRM monitor closeup asset not yet generated.

shots.script_line: Which means one of two things. Either Doug is interested...
shots.camera_notes: Front or slight 3/4. Lean-back posture. Tie-fix action visible.
shots.trigger_notes: tie_fix arm trigger at ~0.0s. smug expression at ~2.0s after tie settles.

shots.script_line: or Doug is tracking me back.
shots.camera_notes: Same framing as shot 04. Lean-back posture maintained.
shots.trigger_notes: smug held from shot 04. Micro eyebrow raise at 'tracking me back'.

shots.script_line: Can I prove that legally? No. Spiritually? The evidence is overwhelming.
shots.required_expression: smug → slow blink on 'No.' → smirk on 'Spiritually'
shots.camera_notes: Front-facing. The deliberate blink on 'No.' is a key comedy beat.
shots.trigger_notes: smug at 0.0s. Slow blink (8-10 frames) at 'No.' Smirk trigger at 'Spiritually'. Hold smirk through 'overwhelming.'

shots.script_line: So I'm staying calm. Making no sudden movements. And pretending this pipeline isn't negotiating with my nervous system. Account management is mostly trust, timing... and quietly panicking in business clothes.
shots.camera_notes: This shot covers the turn toward monitor. Body/head rotation gradual. Final posture: 3/4 angle toward monitor.
shots.trigger_notes: smug held from shot 06. side_eye fires at turn moment. Final delivery of 'quietly panicking' on near-neutral expression.
shots.notes: Extended to 49.8s (from 38.0s) to match full audio duration. Caption map needs expansion — see docs/missing_assets.md.
